title: Compatible Integrated Fridge Freezer Door Hinges for Howdens Lamona HJA6740 HJA6750 LAM6740 HJA6312 HJA6403 HJA6413
features: Manufacturers names and model numbers are used for reference only.
Manufacturers change the design and components of the appliances without changing model numbers and this is beyond our control.
You need to make sure your old hinges have the following codes 3362 5.0 and 3363 5.0, 41.5, 3704 5.0.
